basic_details.job_title: MGAHV Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya (MGAHV) has released the official Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor Notification 2026 at its official website. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced under the MGAHV Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications including Master’s Degree with 55% marks, Ph.D. degree, and NET/SLET/SET qualification (as applicable to the post) can apply online from the available application start date to 17 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application l

age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation rules as per government norms may apply for reserved categories. Age Relaxation: 5% relaxation in marks at Bachelor's and Master's level for SC/ST/OBC(Non-creamy Layer)/Differently-abled candidates. 5% relaxation (from 55% to 50% of marks) for Ph.D. Degree holders (Master's Degree prior to 19th Sept. 1991).

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks, Ph.D. degree, NET/SLET/SET qualified (exemptions apply). Specific qualifications vary by position.
qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. degree in the concerned/ allied/relevant discipline, published work of high quality, minimum of 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of 120, OR minimum of ten years of teaching experience in university/college as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor, and / or research experience at equivalent level at the University/National Level Institutions with evidence of having successfully guided doctoral candidate. Associate Professor: A good academic record, with a Ph.D. Degree in the concerned/ allied/relevant disciplines. A Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. A minimum of eight years of experience of teaching and / or research in an academic/research position equivalent to that of Assistant Professor in a University, College or Accredited Research Institution/industry with a minimum of seven publications in the peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of Seventy-five (75). Assistant Professor: A Master's degree with 55% marks in a concerned/ relevant/allied subject. Candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. OR Ph.D degree from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among top 500 in the World University Ranking.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MGAHV to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.mahatma_gandhi_antarrashtriya_hindi_vish: Master's degree with 55% marks, Ph.D. degree, NET/SLET/SET qualified (exemptions apply). Specific qualifications vary by position.

content_sections.heading: MGAHV Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MGAHV Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MGAHV Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MGAHV Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professor: Ph.D. degree in the concerned/ allied/relevant discipline, published work of high quality, minimum of 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of 120, OR minimum of ten years of teaching experience in university/college as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor, and / or research experience at equivalent level at the University/National Level Institutions with evidence of having successfully guided doctoral candidate. Associate Professor: A good academic record, with a Ph.D. Degree in the concerned/ allied/relevant disciplines. A Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. A minimum of eight years of experience of teaching and / or research in an academic/research position equivalent to that of Assistant Professor in a University, College or Accredited Research Institution/industry with a minimum of seven publications in the peer-reviewed or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of Seventy-five (75). Assistant Professor: A Master's degree with 55% marks in a concerned/ relevant/allied subject. Candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time as the case may be exempted from NET/SLET/SET. OR Ph.D degree from a foreign university/institution with a ranking among top 500 in the World University Ranking.

rows.category: SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates and In-service candidates (regular employees) of MGAHV, Wardha

content_sections.heading: MGAHV Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation rules as per government norms may apply for reserved categories. Age Relaxation: 5% relaxation in marks at Bachelor's and Master's level for SC/ST/OBC(Non-creamy Layer)/Differently-abled candidates. 5% relaxation (from 55% to 50% of marks) for Ph.D. Degree holders (Master's Degree prior to 19th Sept. 1991).

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MGAHV to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MGAHV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications for the MGAHV recruitment is 17 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MGAHV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor in the Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor post, a Master's degree with 55% marks and a cleared National Eligibility Test (NET) or equivalent are required. Ph.D. holders are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for MGAHV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for all candidates is Rs. 1,000/-. However, SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates and in-service employees of MGAHV are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary scale for Professor post?
faq.answer: The Professor post comes with a salary scale of Level 14, ranging from Rs. 1,44,200/- to Rs. 2,18,200/- per month as per the 7th CPC recommendations.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state in India are eligible to apply for the MGAHV recruitment, provided they meet the specified educational and other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MGAHV Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an online application followed by screening of applications and an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While specific age limits are not detailed, age relaxation is generally provided for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per government rules. Please refer to the official notification for exact details.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article by clicking on the provided link for the Official Notification PDF.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of MGAHV?
faq.answer: The official website of Mahatma Gandhi Antarrashtriya Hindi Vishwavidyalaya is www.hindivishwa.org. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates.
